name: Amazon Nova Pro
note: Highest-accuracy multimodal Nova at launch; workhorse mid/high tier for complex text, image and video tasks before Premier arrived.

MMMU val split, CoT prompting, accuracy (Table 3 of the official Amazon Nova technical report).
Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard v3, overall accuracy, Nov 17 2024 leaderboard snapshot (Table 4).

AWS Generative AI Innovation Center blog post (published 2025-07-24), single-answer grading with Anthropic's Claude 3.7 Sonnet as judge (0-10 scale). Nova Pro scored second-highest of the four Nova models with a wider 2.7-point min-max spread (6.44-9.13). Not previously tracked for this model. Same scale-mismatch caveat on Arena-Hard-Auto as noted for Nova Premier applies here too (custom 0-10 Bradley-Terry, not comparable to this corpus's 0-100 'arena-hard' scale) -- deliberately excluded.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Dec 3, 2024 re:Invent launch corroborated by multiple press sources. Confirmed 300K multimodal context, 200-language support, $0.80/$3.20 per M pricing (AWS Nova pricing/docs). All 9 benchmark rows (MMLU 85.9, GPQA 46.9, MATH 76.6, HumanEval 89.0, GSM8K 94.8, BBH 86.9, IFEval 92.1, DROP 85.4, ARC-Challenge 94.8) confirmed to literally appear on deepranking.ai/llm-models/nova-pro. No changes made.
